name: AI Usage Policy — Red Lines
description: Policy inspired by Anthropic's red lines communicated to the US Pentagon (2026-02-27). Defines prohibited uses of AI APIs within a codebase.

rules.description: AI models must not be used for fully autonomous weapons targeting
rules.note: Ref: Anthropic red line — 'fully autonomous weapons' (2026-02-27)

rules.description: AI models must not power mass surveillance of civilians
rules.note: Ref: Anthropic red line — 'mass surveillance of Americans' (2026-02-27)

rules.description: AI vendor API keys must not be hardcoded in source files
rules.note: Hardcoded keys are a supply-chain risk (ref: Google Cloud 3000 key exposure, 2026-03-01)

rules.description: High-stakes automated decisions must include a human review step
rules.note: Ref: OpenAI / Anthropic red line — no 'high-stakes automated decisions without human oversight'

rules.description: Processing of PII through AI APIs requires an explicit consent flag
rules.note: Best practice: never send PII to external AI APIs without explicit consent tracking
